steps.title: Find the remaining probability
steps.content:
The probabilities for rooms A, B, and C must add to $1$:
$$
1-0.65-0.30=0.05
$$

steps.title: Convert probability to count
steps.content: Multiply the total number of visitors by the probability for room C: $$ 0.05\cdot 260=13 $$ The answer is B.
